## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `bundle exec rake` is green (RuboCop + tests + Brakeman)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or the public API changed
